CustomField.description: Used in the 'Nursing AllowanceInLine' invoice template to determine if the allowance pay code should count as part of the 'Shift' allowance column.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Used in the 'Nursing AllowanceInLine' invoice template to determine if the allowance pay code should count as part of the 'Shift' allowance column.
CustomField.label: Shift - Invoice Allowance Column
